pattern: Caller claims to be from CBI, police, or ED, says victim's Aadhaar or bank account is linked to a crime, threatens arrest unless victim stays on video call
Caller instructs victim not to disconnect call or tell family, isolates victim under threat of legal action
Fraudster asks victim to transfer money to a verification account for RBI or court escrow, promises refund after clearance
Caller uses fake government portal or ID card shown on video to appear legitimate, uses uniformed background
Scammer pressures urgency, says case will worsen within hours, discourages independent verification or calling family or lawyer
Caller claims to be from FedEx, DHL, or customs, says a parcel in victim's name contains illegal drugs or fake passports, connects to fake police officer
Fraudster says package is held at customs and requires payment of a clearance fee to release it
Caller asks victim to share OTP or verification code received via SMS to process a refund, prize, or cashback
Caller impersonates bank official asking for card number, CVV, or net banking password to prevent account block
Caller or video caller threatens to leak recorded intimate images or video unless victim pays money immediately
Caller claims victim overpaid a bill or is owed a refund, asks to install remote access app like AnyDesk or TeamViewer to process it
Fraudster asks victim to enter amount in UPI app claiming it is to receive money but is actually a payment request
Caller offers a high paying work from home job and asks for registration fee or security deposit upfront
Caller offers instant loan approval without documents but asks for processing fee to be paid first via UPI
Bank customer service calling to confirm a recent transaction and asking if the customer authorized it, never asks for OTP or password
Telemarketer offering a credit card upgrade or insurance policy, no threats or urgency, customer can decline and hang up freely
Delivery executive calling to confirm address before dropping off a package, no payment requested over call
School or hospital calling to confirm an appointment or share routine updates about a family member
Government helpline callback after citizen filed a complaint, confirms complaint number, does not ask for money or OTP
